message:
fix(core): harden auth persistence, eliminate mutex panics in tests,
and fix TOCTOU path traversal in extension module resolver

Auth subsystem (auth.rs):
- Add AuthFileRef<'a> for zero-copy serialization — avoids cloning the
  entire entries HashMap on every save by serializing a borrowed
  reference instead
- Extract save_data_sync() to share atomic-write logic between save()
  and save_async(), eliminating code duplication
- Backup corrupted auth.json to auth.json.corrupt before resetting —
  preserves forensic evidence instead of silently discarding
- Batch OAuth token saves: accumulate needs_save flag during refresh
  loops and write once at the end instead of save_async() per token,
  reducing filesystem churn during multi-provider refresh

Test robustness (agent.rs):
- Replace .lock().unwrap() and .lock().expect() with
  .lock().unwrap_or_else(PoisonError::into_inner) in 5 test locations
  — prevents test panics from cascading through poisoned mutexes when
  a prior test assertion fails while holding the lock

Security (extensions_js.rs):
- Fix TOCTOU path traversal in resolve_module_path for file:// URLs:
  canonicalize and validate the path BEFORE calling resolve_existing_file
  (which follows symlinks), then re-validate the resolved path after
  resolution. Previously, the security check only ran after resolution,
  allowing a symlink-based escape between the check and use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
